queue.title: SDET
queue.description: Job: 3042379 Job Description: SDET Location: Hartford, CT, or Wellesley, MA (Partial Remote) Role Overview We are seeking two mid to senior-level Software Development Engineers in Test (SDET) to join our engineering team. These contract-to-hire roles are focused on transitioning from traditional QA to an engineering-centric approach by architecting and implementing testing frameworks and tools, particularly for AI agents and conversational AI systems. The ideal candidates will have five or more…
